issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing dependencies or configuration conflicts.
The documentation contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill lacks concrete, realistic usage examples beyond code snippets.

scenarios.name: Configure Prettier with CI gate for TypeScript monorepo
scenarios.rationale: Baseline installs Prettier and runs --check in CI but uses a sparse config without .prettierignore or named format/format:check scripts; treatment supplies the full documented .prettierrc.json option set, ignore file, both npm scripts, and the documented GitHub Actions workflow.

scenarios.name: Resolve ESLint and Prettier rule conflicts with format-on-save
scenarios.rationale: Baseline references eslint-config-prettier and a VS Code formatOnSave setting but uses legacy .eslintrc and omits ordering guidance; treatment uses the flat config with prettierConfig placed last, plus a per-language defaultFormatter map committed to .vscode/settings.json as the skill prescribes.
